name: Female Shockwave, Post Failure Comfort
description:
This is what I live for out here

I fucking loved TF:One so you all gotta deal with it

Sorry for such the delay I’m only one guy, and a busy guy at that

I decided to make her name Shoko so I didn’t have to just type Shockwave the whole time

I FUCKING LOVE TRANSFORMERS RAHHHHHH

I had to make Human Shockwave too cause WHY NOT

She’s also 9’8” so go crazy

Art By: I couldn’t find it someone help
creator: TheRex7576
